member.name: T:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings
member.summary: Helper component mainly used to save Recorder's GameObject references. Some recorders (such as the Animation Recorder) require a GameObject reference from a Scene to record from. In such a case, this component is automatically added to the Scene and binds the selected GameObject to the Recorder Settings.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.SetBindingValue(System.String,UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Binds a particular ID to an Object value.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.GetBindingValue(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a binding for an unique ID.
member.returns: The value corresponding to the key – or null if the key doesn't exist.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.HasBindingValue(System.String)
member.summary: Tests if a value exists for a given key.
member.returns: True if the key value exists, False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.RemoveBinding(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the binding for a key.
member.param: The unique key of the binding to remove.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.IsEmpty
member.returns: True if there are any existing bindings, False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Recorder.RecorderBindings.DuplicateBinding(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Duplicates the binding from an existing key to a new one (makes dst point to the same object as src).
member.param: The key to duplicate the binding from.
The new key that points to the same object.
